verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: That Christ should be born in Bethlehem.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: In Micah: “And thou, Bethlehem, house of Ephrata, art not little, that thou shouldst be appointed among the thousands of Judah.

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Out of thee shall He come forth to me, that He may be a prince in Israel, and His goings forth from the beginning from the days of old.”

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: Also in the Gospel: “And when Jesus was born in Bethlehem of Judah, in the days of Herod the king, behold, Magi came from the east to Jerusalem, saying, Where is He that is born King of the Jews?

verses.book: Three Books of Testimonies Against the Jews.
verses.text: For we have seen His star in the east, and we have come with gifts to worship Him.”
